title: Filthy
lyrics: Yeah, every night I'm with you Lovin' it the way you put it down Lovin' that, all the time, yeah Can you feel it? Can you feel it when we get it in now? Can you feel it all the things I wanna do to you? I wanna see that eyes I wanna see the way that you put it inside your mind I wanna see the fear in your eyes The discomfort of the level and you never put it down Everything we do, baby, when we get down is filthy Always when we get down, baby, yeah, we're filthy Take it to another level, watch it Cop it right inside the zone, boom Bang on the pedal, baby, help me hit it on and on Baby, when you get down Swallow it down, yeah, swallow it down, uh Can you feel the energy comin' in between us? Let me put that shit in since we get it Climax of the town, yeah We are runnin' it up, yeah, runnin' it up We get filthy Every time we get that energy, baby, we're filthy Hangin' such a low heels Me in the zone, baby Got me feelin' like I could do this for the rest of my life When we get down, it's filthy Got me flyin' in the zone Poppin' it over and over and over And carry on long Until we both know Yeah, baby, we're filthy Feelin' in the underneath, everything, we're just filthy Put my fingers right in your mouth Caressin' your pimple, baby, where you goin' now? Yeah, I got my fingers in your mouth Lightin' the nights, baby, we're just filthy But it feels so good when I'm inside you We're filthy But it feels so good, baby, me and you Filthy, it's another thing we do I wanna rock, show you what we do And have you take it to another level, filthy Oh, yeah, you know that, baby, we're filthy I know that you know Every night we flyin' to the land we know, yeah Don't say it's all that we got Cause I'm feelin' it more, feelin' it more, baby, we're filthy Feel it when it comes in, baby, yeah, you hear me And givin' me things more and more, baby, we're filthy
